faqs.answer: Rat extermination in West Brighton typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We use integrated pest management combining inspection, exclusion, trapping, and targeted baiting systems.
